name: Seared Sesame Coated Tuna Over Arugula Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon sesame oil, mixed with 1 teaspoon rice vinegar
1/3 cup white sesame seeds, or a combination of white and black sesame seeds, seasoned with salt and pepper
4 cups washed arugula, mixed with washed Boston lettuce leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Brush tuna with sesame oil mixture and dip sides, bottom, and top into sesame seeds. Transfer to a non-stick baking sheet.
3. Bake for 10 minutes for rare or 20 minutes for more well done.
4. Meanwhile, wash and dry the salad and lightly coat with dressing.
5. To serve, slice tuna steaks on a bias and fan out in the middle of the plate. Surround slices with salad and drizzle soy ginger reduction over the top.
6. Yield: 2 servings
